title: aneilema bracteatum
intro: Aneilema bracteatum, also known as the golden buttons or Indian frog, is a small, herbaceous plant native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aneilema bracteatum include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin infections, wounds, and fever, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Aneilema bracteatum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
